evals.prompt: Generate interview prep for a Product Manager role at Stripe. I'm interviewing next Thursday for a PM role on their payments API team. I've been a PM for 4 years at fintech companies, have shipped 3 payment-related products, and my biggest weakness is that I sometimes over-invest in data before deciding. Generate STAR stories and question prep.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive interview prep with STAR stories, anticipated questions, and Stripe-specific preparation
expectations: Output generates at least 4-5 STAR-format stories from the provided background
Output includes Stripe-specific research questions and talking points
Output prepares for behavioral AND product/case interview questions
Output addresses how to handle the stated weakness constructively
Output organizes prep by question type or interview stage

evals.prompt: I have a final round interview at Google for a Senior Software Engineer role. The loop has 5 interviews: system design, 2 coding rounds, a behavioral/leadership round, and a Googleyness/culture fit round. Help me prepare for all 5 types. I have 7 years of experience in distributed systems.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive prep guide covering all 5 Google interview types with specific preparation for each
expectations: Output covers all 5 interview types separately
Output provides system design framework relevant to distributed systems background
Output generates behavioral stories using the 7 years of experience context
Output addresses the 'Googleyness' round with specific preparation advice
Output includes coding interview tips relevant to the role level
